_readme: Add new entries at the TOP. Format: version, date, title, changes (array of strings)

entries.title: Guild export/import
changes: !exportguild – scan server, save channels + roles to guild_export.json
!importguild [guild_id] – create channels + roles from guild_export.json in target server

entries.title: Fix AI not responding
changes: Added OLLAMA_STREAM=false option—use when streaming hangs (typing but no response)
Non-streaming fallback when stream returns empty
Error message when AI returns nothing

entries.title: Rebrand to OpenPaw
changes: Renamed from Ryan Gosling Eating Cereal to OpenPaw
Removed !cereal command and cereal GIF
Reaction keywords: openpaw, pawsy, paw (was ryan, gosling, cereal)
Default emoji: openpaw (was ryangosling)
Voice announce: OpenPaw is in the voice chat
Removed [CEREAL] from AI, removed cereal from dashboard

entries.title: Embeds + prompt fixes
changes: AI responses now use embeds (thinking in small grey field, response in main section)
Thinking disabled by default (think: false) for faster responses
System prompt: do not mention 'the bot' when answering hacking questions

entries.title: Streaming AI responses
changes: AI streams responses: shows 'thinking...' then streams output via message edits
For thinking-capable models (OLLAMA_THINK=true): streams thinking, deletes it, then streams output
Uses Ollama native /api/chat for streaming

entries.title: Ollama + SYSTEM_PROMPT
changes: AI now uses local Ollama (Uncensored) dolphin-mistral instead of Groq
OLLAMA_MODEL and OLLAMA_BASE_URL env vars
SYSTEM_PROMPT env: set custom system prompt (use \n for newlines)

entries.title: GROQ .env loading fix
changes: Load .env from script directory (fixes key not found when run from other dirs)
Override existing env vars so .env always wins
Startup log shows GROQ status and .env path for debugging

entries.title: fix groq key
changes: Fixed Groq API key

entries.title: Kimi K2 model
changes: Default AI model: moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct-0905

entries.title: Groq API
changes: Switched AI from OpenRouter to Groq API (GROQ_API_KEY in .env)

entries.title: AI uncensored
changes: AI no longer instructed to censor itself – responds naturally

entries.title: Hug command
changes: Added !hug @user – sends a hug (loading message updates in place)

entries.title: Simplified update flow
changes: Removed !getupdate – only !update now
!update reloads and shows changelog only when code actually changed

entries.title: Update system & features
changes: Added !update – reload the bot and apply updates
Added !features – full overview of what the bot can do

entries.title: AI & encryption
changes: AI responds when @mentioned (any channel)
AI uses docs to answer how things work (no raw code)
!encrypt and !decrypt commands
!brutefernet – fast SHA256 brute force with Zeta-force search

entries.title: Core features
changes: !cereal – Ryan Gosling GIF
!quote – create quote cards from messages
Reactions (wordlist/all mode)
Voice auto-join and follow
!start, !stop, !help, !clearmem
